nasb.text: These are the numbered men of the families of the sons of Merari, whom Moses and Aaron numbered according to the commandment of the Lord through Moses.

esv.text: This was the list of the clans of the sons of Merari, whom Moses and Aaron listed according to the commandment of the Lord by Moses.

cnv.text: 這些是米拉利子孫的家族被數點的人數，就是摩西和亞倫，照著耶和華的吩咐數點的。

ccb.text: 这是米拉利宗族的人数，是摩西和亚伦照耶和华的吩咐统计的。
